seoTitle: Wilga vs Wilga West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilga and Wilga West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wilga vs Wilga West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilga and Wilga West.
heading: Wilga vs Wilga West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilga, Western Australia and Wilga West, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilga West has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Wilga (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilga or Wilga West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilga has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Wilga West scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilga scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Wilga West scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilga or Wilga West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilga West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
